title: Select Subway Restaurants: Two 6" Subs $6 (Valid Feb 6 Only)

title: Ad-weary New Yorkers school MTA on ‘annoying’ 75-decibel subway commercials
body: New York City subway riders aren't sold on the MTA's new pilot program to pipe loud commercials into subway cars and commuter trains.

title: 15 Kitchen Ideas for 2026 That Make the All-White Shaker Look Like a Cheap Flip

title: Playbook Partners buys 5% in Subway India for Rs 130 crore
body: Playbook Partners India has bought a stake in Subway India. The deal values the quick-service restaurant chain at over '2,600 crore. Subway India operates more than 1,000 outlets nationwide. This investment comes as Subway India considers a public listing. Se…

title: NYC is under a travel ban until noon: here is what that actually means
body: All non-emergency vehicles are asked to stay off the road until this afternoon, at the very least. The LIRR is suspended and the subway is operating on massive delays.

title: Subway scraps its free sandwich perk just months after relaunch, sparks customer revolt: 'Cheapskates'
body: Two months after relaunching its Sub Club, Subway is eliminating the free fourth footlong offer starting April 1. Franchisees pushed for the program revision.
